title: Assumption
description: An inference made to proceed in the absence of confirmed fact. Recorded with risk-if-wrong and a revisit trigger, never as a requirement (see intake.md). IDs follow the ASM- scheme.

rationale.description: Why this assumption is reasonable / what it is based on.

risk_if_wrong.description: Consequence if the assumption proves false. Mandatory in practice (assumptions without this are unmanaged risk).

revisit_if.description: The trigger/condition under which this assumption should be re-examined.

source.description: Provenance: quoted span or input section, or 'inferred' with basis.

affects.description: Requirements/decisions that depend on this assumption.

open_questions.description: Open questions whose resolution would confirm or refute this assumption.
